title: Runs Away
summary: Your first instinct is to run from danger, and you’ve gotten very good at it.
tiers: Tier 3: Incredible Running Speed or Greater Enhanced Speed
Tier 6: Burst of Escape or Skill With Defense
gm_intrusions: Quick movements sometimes lead to dropped items, slipping on uneven ground, or going the wrong way by accident.
text: Your first instinct is to run from danger, and you’ve gotten very good at it.
details: Your first instinct is to run from danger, and you’ve gotten very good at it.
